title: Cisco layoffs: Tech giant cuts 4,000 jobs to fund growing AI ambitions
description: Cisco is cutting nearly 4,000 jobs while doubling down on artificial intelligence after reporting stronger-than-expected earnings and surging AI infrastructure demand. The company raised its annual forecasts, sending shares sharply higher, as investors backed Cisco’s growing role in powering hyperscaler AI data centres and enterprise networking infrastructure.
content: Cisco is trying to reinvent itself for the AI era, and Wall Street appears convinced the strategy is beginning to work. The networking company reported stronger-than-expected quarterly results on Wednesday, raised its annual revenue forecast and reve... [2875 chars]

title: AI boom puts SK Hynix on the cusp $1 trillion market value
description: SEOUL, May 14 (Reuters) - SK Hynix ⁠is on the verge of topping a $1 trillion market value, just weeks ⁠after Samsung Electronics crossed the milestone, as strong demand for artificial intelligence ‌places South Korea at the heart of Asia's AI boom.

title: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: Sensex, Nifty set for firm start tracking global rally; oil, rupee key concerns
description: Sensex Today | Stock Market Live: Sensex and Nifty are likely to open higher on Thursday tracking strong global cues after US markets hit fresh record highs and Asian stocks rallied sharply on continued artificial intelligence-driven optimism. GIFT Nifty was trading around 23,550 in early morning trade, up 126 points or 0.54 percent.

title: Korea Exchange begins adopting AI in capital market monitoring works
description: SEOUL  -  The Korea Exchange, South Korea’s bourse operator, said Wednesday it has begun adopting artificial intelligence (AI) technology in its capital
content: SEOUL - The Korea Exchange, South Korea’s bourse operator, said Wednesday it has begun adopting artificial intelligence (AI) technology in its capital market monitoring works. The formal adoption of AI technology came about three months after the Kor... [814 chars]

title: Donald Trump, Xi Jinping Meet At China's Great Hall Of The People Ahead Of Crucial Beijing Talks; US President Welcomed Amid Much Fanfare - VIDEOS
description: US President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing on Thursday for high-level talks centred on trade, artificial intelligence and global security. Trump is likely to push for greater Chinese purchases of US goods and improved market access. The summit will also focus on AI chip restrictions, rare earth exports and supply chain stability amid growing geopolitical tensions.
content: Beijing: US President Donald Trump met Chinese President Xi Jinping at Beijing’s Great Hall of the People on Thursday for a closely watched summit expected to shape the future of US-China relations amid growing tensions over trade, artificial intelli... [2795 chars]

title: Robo.ai Subsidiary Neurovia AI Launches NeuroStream™ Technology Platform to Build Physical AI Visual Data Infrastructure
description: **media[1056354]**DUBAI, UAE, May 14, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Robo.ai Inc. (Nasdaq: AIIO), announced today that its wholly-owned AI data processing and compression technology subsidiary, Neurovia AI, has officially released its core technology platform, NeuroStream™. Designed for the machine economy era, the platform utilizes a bitmap vectorization algorithm to provide high-fidelity, low-bandwidth, and low-power infrastructure support for the massive visual data generated by physical artificial intelligence. Mansoor Ali Khan, Chief Technology Officer of Neurovia AI, detailed the platform's technical architecture and application cases.**media[1056355]**

title: Looming AI risks dominate US-China summit as neither side seeks to cede technological edge
description: As high-level delegations from the United States and China prepare for an anticipated summit, discussions surrounding the burgeoning field of artificial intelligence are set to take center stage. title: Blackstone’s AirTrunk Seeks $2 Billion Loan for Malaysia Growth
description: Blackstone Inc.-owned data center firm AirTrunk is marketing a $2.3 billion loan to fund a Malaysia project, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a slew of tech-linked financings in Southeast Asia spurred by the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Cisco layoffs loom as company pivots deeper into AI after strong quarter
description: Cisco is planning to cut fewer than 4,000 jobs as it shifts resources toward artificial intelligence, after the tech giant posted stronger-than-expected earnings.
content:
Cisco Systems is planning to cut nearly 4,000 employees as part of a broader strategic shift toward artificial intelligence (AI), following a stronger-than-expected earnings report on Wednesday.
